title: Trump tells Congress hostilities in Iran 'have terminated' as war powers deadline hits
snippet: President Trump sent formal letter to House Speaker Johnson and Senate President Pro Tempore Grassley: 'The hostilities that began on February 28, 2026, have terminated.' Claims no exchange of fire since April 7 ceasefire. Blockade continues despite 'terminated' declaration. Sen. Blumenthal: 'The blockade alone is a continuing act of war.' Congress left town after Senate rejected WPR for 6th time (50-47).
tag_reason: 첫 보도: 트럼프의 '적대행위 종료' 공식 서한은 5/1 WPR 데드라인 당일 새 조치
